lines.speaker: Spotter Virginia
lines.text: I see you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You do?

lines.speaker: Spotter Virginia
lines.text: Indeed! It's kind of what I do. The name's Virginia. I'm a lookout for the spirit anglers, as well as a six time eye spy world champion.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And what are you on the lookout for at the moment?

lines.speaker: Spotter Virginia
lines.text: To be honest, a new adventure. The anglers have been good to me, but after the chaos with Tempoross, I'd like a fresh start.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Makes sense. Well, I hope one finds you soon.

lines.speaker: Spotter Virginia
lines.text: I hope so too, but not before I find it first!

lines.speaker: Spotter Virginia
lines.text: I see you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You do?

lines.speaker: Spotter Virginia
lines.text: Indeed! It's kind of what I do. The name's Virginia. I'm a lookout for the spirit anglers, as well as a six time eye spy world champion.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And what are you on the lookout for at the moment?

lines.speaker: Spotter Virginia
lines.text: To be honest, a new adventure. The angler's have been good to me, but after the chaos with Tempoross, I'd like a fresh start.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, at some point I plan to hire a crew of my own. I'm not ready for that sort of thing yet, but when I am, maybe you'd be interested?

lines.speaker: Spotter Virginia
lines.text: I think I might be! You just let me know once you start recruiting... provided I don't spot you first, of course!

lines.speaker: Spotter Virginia
lines.text: Spotted again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, hello again. How are things going?

lines.speaker: Spotter Virginia
lines.text: Pretty well, though I'm still on the lookout for a new adventure.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, at some point I plan to hire a crew of my own. I'm not ready for that sort of thing yet, but when I am, maybe you'd be interested?

lines.speaker: Spotter Virginia
lines.text: I think I might be! You just let me know once you start recruiting... provided I don't spot you first, of course!

lines.speaker: Spotter Virginia
lines.text: I see you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You do?

lines.speaker: Spotter Virginia
lines.text: Indeed! It's kind of what I do. The name's Virginia. I'm a lookout for the spirit anglers, as well as a six time eye spy world champion.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And what are you on the lookout for at the moment?

lines.speaker: Spotter Virginia
lines.text: To be honest, a new adventure. The angler's have been good to me, but after the chaos with Tempoross, I'd like a fresh start.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe I could help? How about you join my crew?

lines.speaker: Spotter Virginia
lines.text: Sorry, but I can't see that happening right now. Maybe once you're more experienced.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe I could help? How about you join my crew?

lines.speaker: Spotter Virginia
lines.text: Sure! I can watch your back!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I hope one finds you soon.

lines.speaker: Spotter Virginia
lines.text: I hope so too, but not before I find it first!

lines.speaker: Spotter Virginia
lines.text: Nice to see you, Captain.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. How are things going?

lines.speaker: Spotter Virginia
lines.text: Pretty good. I'm very much enjoying seeing the sights.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, let me know if you spot anything worth looking into.

lines.speaker: Spotter Virginia
lines.text: Aye, Captain!
